title: AI Worker Task Contract v2
description: Next-generation control-plane schema for AI batch launcher task definitions. Extends v1 with fact-to-task protocol fields (dependsOnFacts, producesFacts), flattened top-level role/attention/review fields, writeSet/sharedLocks for granular file control, telemetry, and rollbackPlan. Aligned with docs/ai-native/task-schema-v2.md.

taskType.description: execution = write code/docs, research = read-only, review = evaluate existing work

workerClass.description: Task classification for routing and scheduling (e.g. 'schema-task-v2', 'backend-runtime', 'docs-worker'). Used by the launcher to select worker templates and conflict resolution strategies.

risk.description: low = docs/config, medium = cross-module, high = auth/data/public API

conflictGroup.description: Tasks in the same group must not run concurrently on overlapping files

targetPR.description: Target PR number if updating an existing PR, null for new work

expectedPR.description: Whether this task should produce a PR

allowedFiles.description: Glob patterns the worker MAY edit

forbiddenFiles.description: Glob patterns the worker MUST NOT edit, even if inside allowedFiles

writeSet.description: Exact file paths or narrow globs the worker is expected to write. Subset of allowedFiles. Used by the launcher to detect scope creep — if the worker touches files outside writeSet but inside allowedFiles, the launcher logs a warning.

sharedLocks.description: File paths or globs that this task reads but does not write. The launcher grants shared (read) locks; other tasks in the same conflictGroup may also hold shared locks on these files, but no task may hold an exclusive (write) lock while shared locks are active.

validation.description: Shell commands the worker must run before opening a PR. Replaces v1 validationCommands.

actorRole.description: Role name matching ops/agent-prompts/*.md. Promoted from v1 rolePacket.actorRole for top-level visibility.

roleDescription.description: One-line summary of what this worker does. Promoted from v1 rolePacket.description.

rolePacket.description: v1 compatibility wrapper. If present, launcher merges into top-level actorRole/roleDescription.

attentionFocus.description: Key constraints or priorities the worker must keep in mind. Promoted from v1 attentionAreas.focus.

knownBlindspots.description: Patterns or mistakes to actively avoid. Promoted from v1 attentionAreas.knownBlindspots.

attentionAreas.description: v1 compatibility wrapper. If present, launcher merges into top-level attentionFocus/knownBlindspots.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the fact asserts

source.description: Where this fact was produced (issue number, PR, doc path)

dependsOnFacts.description: Facts that must be established before this task can run. The launcher validates these facts exist in the fact registry before scheduling the task.

factId.description: Unique identifier for the fact this task will produce

description.description: Human-readable description of what the fact will assert

confidence.description: How certain the task is that it will produce this fact. definite = guaranteed output, likely = expected but not certain, conditional = depends on runtime findings.

producesFacts.description: Facts this task commits to producing. Downstream tasks can declare these in their dependsOnFacts. The launcher tracks fact production for dependency resolution.

requiredReviewRoles.description: Roles that must review before merge. Promoted from v1 reviewAndAcceptance.requiredReviewRoles.

acceptanceOwner.description: Who has final merge authority. Promoted from v1 reviewAndAcceptance.acceptanceOwner.

reviewAndAcceptance.description: v1 compatibility wrapper. If present, launcher merges into top-level requiredReviewRoles/acceptanceOwner.

budget.description: Resource limits. Replaces v1 budgets (singular naming).

budgets.description: v1 compatibility alias. If present, launcher copies to budget.

emitHeartbeat.description: Whether the worker should emit periodic heartbeat events during execution

tags.description: Freeform tags for telemetry filtering (e.g. wave name, feature area)

telemetry.description: Observability settings. The launcher configures the worker process to emit telemetry according to these settings.

strategy.description: git-revert = revert the merge commit, manual-fixforward = open a follow-up issue, auto-revert-if-ci-fails = revert automatically if post-merge CI fails

notes.description: Additional rollback guidance for the human reviewer

rollbackPlan.description: Defines how to undo this task's changes if they cause problems post-merge.

sourceIssue.description: GitHub issue URL — the semantic source of truth for this task.

knowledgeRefs.description: File paths or URLs the worker should read for semantic context.

promptHandoff.description: Concise description of what to build and why. Derived from the issue title or body.

sourceOfTruthDocs.description: Authoritative spec files for this task. Every code change must trace back to a documented contract.

blockedBy.description: Issue numbers or task IDs that must merge before this task can start.

mainHealthPolicy.description: Health checks required before opening a PR.

generatedCodePolicy.description: How the worker should handle generated artifacts.

llmExtracted.description: True when the task JSON was produced by LLM extraction.
